name: nas-nlp
description: Automatically discover optimal neural architectures for NLP tasks using NAS that explores attention patterns and layer configurations without manual specification.
paperTitle: Neural Architecture Search for Natural Language Processing

content:
## Neural Architecture Search for Natural Language Processing

NAS treats architecture design as an optimization problem, finding which layer combinations work best.

### Core Concept

NAS treats architecture design as an optimization problem, finding which layer combinations work best. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
